que: What is the primary purpose of the TextField widget in Flutter?
options: To get text input from the user

que: TextField is commonly used in which of the following?
Which parameter of TextField controls the text being edited?
Which parameter of TextField controls the visual appearance (label, hint, icon, etc.)?
Which parameter of TextField specifies the type of keyboard to use?
Which parameter of TextField should be set to true for password fields?
Which parameter of TextField is called whenever the user changes the text?
Which parameter of TextField controls the maximum number of lines?
Which parameter of TextField determines whether the field is interactive?
What is the default value of the decoration parameter in TextField?
What is the default value of textAlign in TextField?
What is the default value of autofocus in TextField?
What is the default value of obscureText in TextField?
What is the default value of textCapitalization in TextField?
Which parameter of TextField controls how many lines the field can grow to at most?
Which parameter of TextField can be used to control focus behavior?
According to the quick tips, which object should you use to read or modify the text?
According to the quick tips, what should you use for labels, hints, and icons around a TextField?
Which of the following is listed as something to avoid with TextField?
options: Using TextField for read-only text—use Text instead

que: What must you not forget to do when you create a TextEditingController for a TextField?
options: Dispose of the controller when it is no longer needed

que: Which parameter of TextField controls the action button on the keyboard (e.g., done, next)?
Which parameter of TextField can be used to change the style of the input text?
Which parameter can be used to control how the text is capitalized as the user types?
Which of these is a good use case for TextField?
options: Letting the user type a search query
